name: changelog-writer
description: Generate user-facing changelog entries from git history — plain language, audience-segmented, with optional CHANGELOG.md update.

interface.shortDescription: Generate user-facing changelog entries from git history — plain language, audience-segmented, with optional CHANGELOG.md update.
interface.longDescription: Generate user-facing changelog entries from git history — plain language, audience-segmented, with optional CHANGELOG.md update. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Write a user-facing changelog for the changes since the last release. Segment by audience: users, developers, operators. Plain language only — no commit hashes or internal jargon.
